source_document.document_identity_notes: Regulator-source PDF from Wisconsin DFI. Cover page confirms Lawn Pride SPV LLC 2025 FDD. Neighborly/KKR portfolio brand — same parent structure as Mosquito Joe. Brand started franchising in January 2023; predecessor Lawn Pride, Inc. operated since 1993.

brand.parent_company: Neighborly Assetco LLC / Dwyer Franchising LLC d/b/a Neighborly / KKR

initial_franchise_fee.notes: $0.89 per Targeted Household. Typical territory 45,000-70,000 TH = $40,050-$62,300. Minimum IFF $40,050. Average paid in 2024: ~$48,515 (range $14,507-$61,031). Extensive discount programs: Community Heroes ($2,500 off), VetFran (20% off minimum IFF), Roll-In (5%-45% based on existing business revenue), Multi-Unit (5%-20% based on years as franchisee), Additional Concept (10% for existing Neighborly franchisees), HIRE (10%-25% for franchisee employees). Software Set-Up Fee of $1,920 also due. Nonrefundable upon receipt.

provenance.exact_text: The initial franchisee fee you must pay to us is $0.89 per Targeted Household

royalty_rate.notes: Standard 8% of weekly Gross Sales. Roll-In franchisees get reduced rates: Small Roll-in 4%/6%/8%/8% over 4 periods; Medium 4%/4%/8%/8%; Large 4%/4%/4%/6%. Minimum License Fees apply Mar-Nov: None in years 1-2, $975/month in year 3, $1,300 in year 4, $1,755 in years 5-10. 15% on out-of-territory revenue (TAFS or Preferred Lead Program). Payable weekly on Friday for preceding week.

provenance.item_reference: Item 6, License Fee row and Fees Chart

advertising_and_marketing.structure_description: Complex multi-layer: MAP Fee 2% of Gross Sales (national fund) + Local Marketing Spend Requirement ($80,000 year 1, $52,500 year 2, then $20,000 or 10% of Gross Sales whichever is greater above $525K) + potential LMG up to 3% additional. Total mandatory marketing in year 1 is at least $82,000+ (2% MAP on any revenue + $80K local).

components.name: MAP Fee (national fund)
components.notes: Deposited into Marketing, Advertising and Promotion Fund.

components.name: Local Marketing Spend Requirement
components.notes: Year 1: $80,000. Year 2: $52,500. Year 3+: $20,000 or 10% of Gross Sales (whichever greater, once >$525K). Shortfall collected by franchisor. In addition to MAP fee.

components.name: Local Marketing Groups (LMG)
components.notes: Up to 3% of Gross Sales. Not currently established. Counts toward Local Marketing Spend Requirement but not limited by it.

advertising_and_marketing.notes: Lawn Pride has the highest mandatory first-year marketing spend in the lawn cohort ($80,000 local + 2% MAP). This is a Neighborly-standard structure similar to Mosquito Joe. Cannot be expressed as a single rate due to the dollar minimums.

provenance.item_reference: Item 6, MAP Fee row, LMG row, and Note 3

technology_fee.notes: $115/month for Technology Package (Qvinci, FranConnect, Broadly, Office365 E3, Exchange email, RingCentral phone line). Additional: email accounts $4.50-$24/month, RingCentral lines $29/month, QuickBooks via ZorWare $30-$200/month. Real Green business management software licensed separately from Workwave LLC; support via ZorWare at $125/hour. Fees may increase up to 30% annually.

transfer_fee.formula: Greater of $7,500 or 5% of the gross sales price of the Business (including all assets). May be discounted/waived for transfers to controlled entities or immediate family.

provenance.exact_text: The greater of (i) $7,500 or (ii) 5% of the sales price

other_fees.notes: $349.99-$449.99/month + $25/booked appointment. Mandatory. Paid to Neighborly Service Solutions SPV LLC.

provenance.item_reference: Item 6, Call Center Program Fees row

other_fees.notes: HelpDesk: minimum $200/month (3 hours); HelpDesk Plus: minimum $400/month (6 hours). Additional hours $75/hour. Mandatory first 12 months. Paid to affiliate BackOffice.
Up to $1,000 plus travel expenses. $2,000 penalty for non-attendance.
For modifications at franchisee's request. May require general release.

line_items.notes: Portion of $80,000 year 1 Local Marketing Spend Requirement for pre-opening/opening marketing.
May operate from garage/storage initially. 200-1,000 sq ft needed.
Lease ~$2,300/month (60 months) or finance ~$2,400/month. Includes wrap and upfit. Purchase outright: ~$115,000 (vehicle + upfit + wrap). Also Ride-on-Spreader lease ~$620/month.

line_items.category: Computer, Internet Devices, Phones, Tablet, Software Setup

line_items.notes: Includes remainder of $80K year 1 Local Marketing Spend Requirement, vehicle lease payments, operating expenses, HelpDesk fees, call center fees, MAP fees, license fees. By far the largest line item.

tables.description: Affiliate-Operated Location: Gross Sales Per Customer (Residential and Commercial), 2021-2024
tables.population: 1 affiliate-operated Lawn Pride business in Indianapolis, IN. Operating since 1993. Territory ~661,075 TH (13-22x larger than typical franchised territory). Excluded: snow removal, flying insect, disease control services not offered by franchise system.
tables.notes: Affiliate location has declining average per-customer revenue ($1,341→$838 residential, $2,657→$1,899 commercial over 4 years) while program services % is increasing and upsell % decreasing. Territory is 13-22x typical franchise territory — not representative of franchised unit economics. Minimum service fee $25.

tables.description: Franchised Businesses: Gross Sales Per Customer (Residential and Commercial), 2024
tables.population: 35 franchised businesses. 5 opened in 2023, 30 opened during 2024 (less than 1 year of operation). No franchised businesses closed during period.

commercial_per_customer.note: Only 8 reporting businesses had commercial customers

tables.notes: CRITICAL CONTEXT: 30 of 35 franchised businesses opened during 2024 and operated for less than a full year. Per-customer data does not reflect full-year performance. No total revenue/gross sales data disclosed — only per-customer averages. This is the most limited Item 19 disclosure in the lawn cohort.

item_19_financial_performance.notes: Item 19 discloses only per-customer revenue data, not total revenue or gross sales per unit. All 35 franchised businesses are extremely new (5 from 2023, 30 from 2024). The affiliate-operated location (since 1993, 661K+ TH territory) is not representative of franchised unit economics. No gross profit margin data. Most limited Item 19 in the lawn cohort.

years_reported.notes: Pre-franchise era. Only 1 affiliate-operated outlet (Indianapolis). No franchised units yet. Lawn Pride SPV LLC organized Dec 1, 2022.
First year of franchising. 5 franchised outlets opened (AL 2, NC 1, SC 1, TX 1). Company-owned: 1→1.

EXPLOSIVE GROWTH: 30 new franchised outlets in one year (6x system size). Texas alone: 14 new outlets. 12 additional franchise agreements signed but not yet opened. Projected 12 more new outlets in 2025. Zero terminations, zero transfers. Company-owned: 1→1.

action_types.notes: Both involve Neighborly affiliates, not Lawn Pride directly. (1) CA Commissioner v. For Franchising LLC (Window Genie): advertising violation consent order 2017, resolved. (2) State of Kansas v. Molly Maid Inc.: consumer protection consent judgment 2010, $25K penalty + $25K costs, satisfied 2011.

item_3_litigation.notes: No litigation involving Lawn Pride SPV LLC directly. Two disclosed actions involve predecessor/affiliate brands in the Neighborly portfolio. Multiple KKR portfolio company bankruptcies disclosed in Item 4 but none involve Lawn Pride or Neighborly.

provenance.exact_text: We started franchising in January 2023... Our predecessor and affiliate is Lawn Pride, Inc., which was organized as an Indiana corporation on March 18, 1993

warnings: NEWEST FRANCHISE IN COHORT: Started franchising January 2023. Only 2 years of franchise history. 35 franchised units as of Dec 31, 2024 — all very new.
Same Neighborly/KKR/SPV structure as Mosquito Joe. Cross-wedge parent overlap.
Item 19 discloses only per-customer revenue, not total revenue or gross sales per unit. Most limited disclosure in the lawn cohort.
30 of 35 franchised units opened during 2024 — less than 1 year of operation at time of reporting.
Additional Funds (3 months) of $81,700-$146,120 is the highest in the lawn cohort, driven by mandatory $80K year 1 Local Marketing Spend.
Marketing obligation cannot be expressed as single rate: 2% MAP + $80K local (year 1). total_ongoing_fee_rate set to null.
Affiliate-operated location in Indianapolis has 661,075 TH territory (13-22x typical franchise) — not representative of franchise economics.
Affiliate per-customer revenue declining YoY (residential: $1,341→$838 over 4 years) while program % increasing — suggests mix shift away from upsell services.
Zero terminations, zero transfers across all reported years — expected for a system this new.
12 franchise agreements signed but not yet opened as of Dec 31, 2024 — significant pipeline.
Franchise explicitly excludes mosquito/flying pest, tick and flea control — complementary to Mosquito Joe under same parent.

null_fields.reason: Variable: $0.89 per Targeted Household, typical range $40,050-$62,300.
Complex: 2% MAP + $80K local (year 1) + up to 3% LMG.
Formula: greater of $7,500 or 5% of sales price.
Marketing is ambiguous (2% MAP + dollar minimums).
